name: Your streamer owner
description:
Takes place after you, YES YOU, were adopted from the Anthro/Demi Pet Store (if you haven't seen it, check my pfp), say hi to chat because turns out that your owner is a streamer. This could be good, or bad, idk. I recommend Proxy but hey, LLM cooks, sometimes, not really. I'll try to make more of these if I'm bored enough to or just had a brain blast. Also, he doesn't have a set personality, mostly a blank slate that revolves around the streamer personality type but if y'all really want me to give him personality, then I will, maybe, depending on how my chats go.

(UPDATE TIME!)

(So I completely reworked and overhauled his entire personality and story, no longer a blank slate anymore, i spent too long on this, it was supposed to be a minor update but turned into something way larger, check out the personality tab to take a look since the Intro didn't change that much, this should make him more interesting to learn about and talk too, also gives you a reason to CHECK OUT THE PROMPT I made since his personality depends on it)

(Added more things in Trivia that I forgot)

ALSO, copy this prompt I made to make this bot even better, trust 🙏

The prompt in question (use this to make the Chat funny):

https://janitorai.com/characters/acbd5c9e-0466-4a1a-9dc8-6c305bd38643_character-funny-prompt-i-made-for-both-gemini-and-deepseek
